streams.pump_role: single feed containing all reagents premixed in DES
streams.reasoning: From Chemistry Plan stream_logic: Single premixed feed with all components stable at room temperature. Nitrile oxide only forms at 120°C in reactor. Premixing ensures dipolarophile is present to trap transient nitrile oxide and prevent furoxan dimerization. DES viscosity requires single stream to avoid mixing issues.

mixing_order_reasoning: From Chemistry Plan: All reagents premixed in DES at room temperature since reaction only initiates at 120°C. Critical that dipolarophile is homogeneously distributed when nitrile oxide forms. Two-stream mixing problematic due to high DES viscosity causing poor micromixing.
pre_reactor_steps: Warm feed reservoir to 40-50°C to reduce DES viscosity for improved pumping
post_reactor_steps: Collect product stream directly - no quench required as per Chemistry Plan
chemistry_notes: Thermal 1,3-dipolar cycloaddition driven by 120°C heat in DES medium. Rate-limiting step is in-situ nitrile oxide generation from ethyl nitroacetate dehydration, followed by [3+2] cycloaddition with phenylacetylene. Flow advantages: precise temperature control prevents solvent bumping, excellent heat transfer accelerates nitrile oxide formation, short residence time ideal for continuous operation. DES acts as both solvent and promoter without additional base/catalyst. BPR required to maintain liquid phase and prevent degassing of water byproduct.

reasoning_per_field.residence_time_min: Calculation estimated 60.0 min (range 1.0-90.0 min). Analogy 2 used 179 min for oxadiazole synthesis at 154°C, Analogy 3 used 20 min for [3+2] cycloaddition at 60°C. Using 60 min as calculated - longer than typical cycloadditions due to rate-limiting nitrile oxide generation step.
reasoning_per_field.flow_rate_mL_min: Calculation: V_R/τ = 30.0 mL / 60.0 min = 0.5 mL/min. Matches calculated total flow rate.
reasoning_per_field.temperature_C: Same as batch (120°C) - required for nitrile oxide generation from ethyl nitroacetate dehydration. Chemistry Plan confirms thermal activation needed.
reasoning_per_field.concentration_M: Adjusted from batch 0.5 M to 0.0333 M based on phenylacetylene limiting reagent concentration in calculated reactor volume.
reasoning_per_field.BPR_bar: Calculation required 5.0 bar due to gas-liquid system (water generation) and high temperature operation. Prevents uncontrolled degassing.
reasoning_per_field.reactor_type: Coil reactor as specified in Chemistry Plan for thermal reaction. Provides good heat transfer for 120°C operation.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_material: PFA for high temperature (120°C) compatibility and chemical resistance to DES. Not photochemical so transparency not required.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_ID_mm: 1.0 mm from calculation to handle DES viscosity while maintaining plug flow (Pe = 691). Wider than typical to reduce pressure drop.
reasoning_per_field.reactor_volume_mL: 30.0 mL from calculation (τ × Q_total = 60 min × 0.5 mL/min).
reasoning_per_field.light_setup: Empty string - not photochemical reaction as confirmed by Chemistry Plan.
reasoning_per_field.wavelength_nm: Null - thermal reaction only, no light required.
reasoning_per_field.deoxygenation_method: Null - Chemistry Plan confirms no oxygen sensitivity.
